The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to exhibit anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, which may help in the management of various health conditions such as fever and respiratory infections. Bioactive constituents of Neoleretia pittosporoides include alkaloids, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties.
